nodalDepartmentName.label: Department Of Woman Empowerment & Child Development

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Mukhyamantri Mahila Poshan Yojana" has been launched by the Department of Women Empowerment & Child Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to improve the health of pregnant and lactating women by providing nutritional food such as eggs twice a week and dates twice a week at Anganwadi Centres.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under the scheme, pregnant and lactating women are provided eggs two days a week and dates two days a week. Dates are given to those registered women who do not consume eggs.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the health of pregnant and lactating women by providing nutritional food such as eggs twice a week and dates twice a week at Anganwadi Centres.

children.text: The scheme "Mukhyamantri Mahila Poshan Yojana" has been launched by the Department of Women Empowerment & Child Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to improve the health of pregnant and lactating women by providing nutritional food such as eggs twice a week and dates twice a week at Anganwadi Centres.
Under the scheme, pregnant and lactating women are provided eggs two days a week and dates two days a week. Dates are given to those registered women who do not consume eggs.
Women who are registered at the Anganwadi Centre receive the benefits at the centre itself.

applicationProcess.process_md: Women who are registered at the Anganwadi Centre receive the benefits at the centre itself.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand. 1. The applicant must be a pregnant or lactating woman.

children.text: The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The applicant must be a pregnant or lactating woman.
